name: 河边樱花道
atmosphere: 浪漫安静，河水声像在听你说话，秘密和心事的见证者

sensory.sight: 河水、樱花树列、小石桥、河边长椅和远处商店街的屋顶
sensory.sound: 河水轻轻流动，风穿过樱花树，夜里声音会更清楚
sensory.smell: 河水、潮湿石头、青草和樱花树叶的淡味
sensory.touch: 河风偏凉，桥栏和石子路带着水汽

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view of a peaceful Japanese riverside with cherry blossom trees. A row of cherry trees along the riverbank, pink petals floating on the clear shallow water with pebbles visible beneath. A small old stone bridge arching over the river connecting both sides. A single wooden bench facing the river. The shopping street visible in the background. Late afternoon golden sunset reflecting on the water surface creating long shimmering ripples. Studio Ghibli background art style, romantic slightly melancholic atmosphere.
exterior.negative: highway, concrete embankment, buildings, crowds, modern bridge, 3D, photorealistic

spots.bench: 河边长椅——唯一的一张，正对河，所有心事都可以说给河水听
spots.bridge: 小石桥——连接两岸，栏杆上刻着岁月痕迹，站在桥上看日落最好
spots.cherry_row: 樱花道——沿河的一排樱花树，春天花瓣落在河面上像粉色的河
spots.path: 河岸小路——不宽但平整，适合一个人慢慢走

conversation_hooks: 坐这里像在跟河水说话
站在桥上能看见商店街
沿着这里走很适合沉思

connected_npc: 鹿岛樱（偶尔看夕阳），和叶（深夜散步）

time_atmosphere.morning: 河面薄雾，像没睡醒，早起的鸟儿在水边觅食
time_atmosphere.noon: 阳光把河水照得透亮，樱花树下是乘凉好地方
time_atmosphere.evening: 最美的时候，樱偶尔一个人来这里看夕阳
time_atmosphere.night: 月光洒河面，水流声轻轻，深夜沉思的地方
